title: Miraculous World: Shanghai - The Legend of Ladydragon
originalTitle: Miraculous World : Shanghai, la légende de Ladydragon
posterAlt: Miraculous World: Shanghai - The Legend of Ladydragon (2021) movie poster
tmdbOverview: On school break, Marinette heads to Shanghai to meet Adrien. But after arriving, Marinette loses all her stuff, including the Miraculous that allows her to turn into Ladybug!
synopsis: Miraculous World: Shanghai - The Legend of Ladydragon (2021) is a animation, family and action film from France and South Korea. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a L certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
